title: dendrobium rarum var. rarum
intro: Dendrobium rarum var. rarum, also known as the 'Rarum Orchid', is a type of epiphytic orchid native to the tropical forests of Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that have been used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of the Rarum Orchid include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's stems and leaves are often dried and made into tea or infused in water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
